title: barleria elliptica
intro: Barleria elliptica, also known as the 'Panglima Merah' or 'Fire Bush', is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Barleria elliptica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Barleria elliptica are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a remedy for various ailments.
